title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agent-first software development platform that enables developers to build, orchestrate, and monitor AI agents. The platform connects agents to code editors, terminals, and browsers for autonomous development task execution. A new CLI was released with features demonstrated in a walkthrough.
